query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS password_reset_tokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  usedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX idx_token (token),
  INDEX idx_userId_expiresAt (userId, expiresAt)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4XjEEts3MFeNP3d.root --database VHJr573C49poDxnZCnBs44 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS password_reset_tokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,

  usedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX idx_token (token),
  INDEX idx_userId_expiresAt (userId, expiresAt)
);
